# PERF-129 positive: range binds value to a name that is never used
lang: go
file: PERF-129-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "fmt"

func Indices(xs []int) []int {
	out := make([]int, 0, len(xs))
	for _, unusedVal := range xs {
		out = append(out, len(out))
	}
	return out
}

func _() {
	fmt.Println(Indices([]int{1, 2, 3}))
}
